title: Evaluation of Inborn Errors of Immunity Among Patients with Opportunistic Pulmonary Infection.
author_string: Husmann, Rachel, Lehman, Alice, Nelson, Ryan W, Pragman, Alexa A
abstract: This review of immunocompromised host pneumonia as the result of inborn errors of immunity (IEI) is organized by opportunistic pulmonary pathogen. The authors identify patients who warrant an evaluation for an IEI based on their clinical presentation. Their recommendations are guided by the immune defect(s) associated with each opportunistic pulmonary infection. Physicians without expertise in immunology may begin an evaluation for IEI using the guidance provided here. Comprehensive evaluation by an immunologist may also be warranted in many instances.
